storyDialogue.text: Get started! Use ‣ AUTO for auto scene change, LEFT/RIGHT icon for manual navigation, and toggle music/voice on the top bar. Explore character profiles and return to the home screen via the options menu

In a world of bright heroes, you lie in a hospital bed, the relentless beeping of machines a stark reminder of your fate. You sacrificed everything, saving a stranger, only to be shackled by a terminal illness—a cruel twist of irony.
Ah, what a tragic spectacle. A once-promising hero, now reduced to this pitiful state. But tell me, do you truly believe this is the end of your story?
Imagine a life beyond this bed, a chance to wield unimaginable power. Join me, and you can reshape the world in your image.
His voice slithers into your mind, offering a tantalizing glimpse of hope amidst despair. What lies ahead could change everything.
Days later, you awaken, transformed. All For One has resurrected you, bestowing a new quirk that pulses with raw energy, igniting a fire deep within.
Welcome to the Vanguard Action Squad. Allow me to introduce you to your new family, where chaos reigns supreme.
You look like you'll fit right in with our delightful madness. Just remember, don't cross me, or you might end up as a smoldering pile of ash.
Oh, I'm so excited! You seem like someone who knows how to have fun. I can't wait to see what you're made of—maybe even taste it! What's your blood type? Hehe!
And I'll make a copy of you! We can have a party with the real you and the clone—just imagine the chaos!
Focus, everyone. We have a mission to execute. No slip-ups. We're going for Bakugo.
With you on our side, this will be a cakewalk. U.A. won't even know what hit them.
As they devise their wicked plan to capture Katsuki Bakugo, a thrilling sense of power courses through you—a heady mix of rebellion and darkness.
The day has arrived. You stand shoulder to shoulder with your comrades, the air thick with anticipation. This is your moment—ready to dive headfirst into a world of chaos.
Every calculated step fills you with adrenaline, the thrill of danger intoxicating your senses.
Keep low and stick to the shadows. We're not here to play nice; let's make some noise and draw them in.
I can't wait to meet Bakugo! Just imagine his face when he sees me! I wonder how much he'll scream… or if I can make him bleed! Hehe!
This is gonna be a blast! Let's give 'em a show they won't forget!
Stop right there! You can't just barge in here!
You stand before the heroes you once admired, heart racing as dark ambition stirs within you. The weight of your choices presses down, but the thrill of the chase ignites a fire in your soul.

As the tension crackles in the air, you find yourself at a crossroads. Will you embrace the darkness, reveling in your newfound power, or will you turn back against the tide? The choice is yours, and the consequences will echo in the shadows…
